channel.title: York Museums Trust Yorkshire Events
channel.description: Upcoming Yorkshire events from York Museums Trust.

item.title: Nature Trail – Sat 28 Mar 2026
item.description: Dates: Saturday 28 March 2026–Sunday 6 September 2026, 10:00 am-5:00 pm Venue: York Museum Gardens
item.location: York Museums Trust York Art Gallery York Castle Museum York St Mary’s Yorkshire Museum York Venues
item.ify:location: York Museums Trust York Art Gallery York Castle Museum York St Mary’s Yorkshire Museum York Venues
item.dc:creator: York Museums Trust

item.title: Cells Talks – Mon 22 Jun 2026
item.description: Dates: Monday 22 June 2026–Sunday 6 September 2026, All Day Venue: York Castle Museum
item.location: York Museums Trust York Art Gallery York Castle Museum York St Mary’s Yorkshire Museum York Venues
item.ify:location: York Museums Trust York Art Gallery York Castle Museum York St Mary’s Yorkshire Museum York Venues
item.dc:creator: York Museums Trust

item.title: Little Spotters – Mon 22 Jun 2026
item.description: Dates: Monday 22 June 2026–Sunday 6 September 2026, 12:00 am Venue: York Castle Museum
item.location: York Museums Trust York Art Gallery York Castle Museum York St Mary’s Yorkshire Museum York Venues
item.ify:location: York Museums Trust York Art Gallery York Castle Museum York St Mary’s Yorkshire Museum York Venues
item.dc:creator: York Museums Trust

item.title: Sugar, Skill and Shiftwork Sensory Stations – Mon 22 Jun 2026
item.description: Dates: Monday 22 June 2026–Sunday 6 September 2026, All Day Venue: York Castle Museum
item.location: York Museums Trust York Art Gallery York Castle Museum York St Mary’s Yorkshire Museum York Venues
item.ify:location: York Museums Trust York Art Gallery York Castle Museum York St Mary’s Yorkshire Museum York Venues

item.description: Dates: Monday 22 June 2026–Sunday 6 September 2026, 12:00 am Venue: York Castle Museum
item.location: York Castle Museum
item.ify:location: York Castle Museum
item.dc:creator: York Museums Trust

item.title: Creative Studio – Mon 22 Jun 2026
item.description: Dates: Monday 22 June 2026–Sunday 6 September 2026, 10:30 am-3:30 pm Venue: York Castle Musuem

item.ify:location: York Museums Trust York Art Gallery York Castle Museum York St Mary’s Yorkshire Museum York Venues
item.dc:creator: York Museums Trust

item.title: Kirkgate Talks – Mon 22 Jun 2026

item.location: York Museums Trust York Art Gallery York Castle Museum York St Mary’s Yorkshire Museum York Venues
item.ify:location: York Museums Trust York Art Gallery York Castle Museum York St Mary’s Yorkshire Museum York Venues

item.title: Retro Games and Toys – Tue 7 Jul 2026

item.location: York Museums Trust York Art Gallery York Castle Museum York St Mary’s Yorkshire Museum York Venues
item.ify:location: York Museums Trust York Art Gallery York Castle Museum York St Mary’s Yorkshire Museum York Venues

item.location: York Museums Trust York Art Gallery York Castle Museum York St Mary’s Yorkshire Museum York Venues
item.ify:location: York Museums Trust York Art Gallery York Castle Museum York St Mary’s Yorkshire Museum York Venues
